column2: Places coverage insufficient: queries return wrong-city or junk photos; only verifiable POI (Administracao Municipal) fails QA (readable signage reproduced from reference, text-only invents wrong building); cannot name 4 real walkable POIs with confidence

Only 1 verifiable walkable POI (Yushu Park, generated text-only as anchor); Places photos for Yushu Jilin are selfies/junk and no other real POIs (square, museum, pedestrian street) verifiable with confidence
